data.title: Franklin Templeton Files For Spot Solana ETF With SEC
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on February 22, Franklin Templeton officially submitted an S-1 filing to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) for a spot Solana ETF.

data.description:

data.title: North Korea’s Lazarus Group exposed as the group behind Bybit hack
data.description:
Bybit got ripped apart by hackers today, and now we know exactly who did it. The infamous Lazarus Group, North Korea’s state-backed cybercriminal syndicate, has been exposed as the masterminds behind the $1.5 billion Bybit exploit, which is the largest crypto theft in history. The confirmation came from ZachXBT, one of the most respected on-chain […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/north-koreas-lazarus-group-exposed-as-the-group-behind-bybit-hack/

data.title: ZachXBT identifies Lazarus Group as behind Bybit $1.4B hack, wins Arkham bounty
data.description:
After the Bybit exchange was hacked for over $1.4 billion, the crypto community on X reacted with support and security advice for users.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/zach-xbt-identifies-lazarus-group-bybit-hack-arkham-bounty?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Coinbase CEO’s Hot Take: Bitcoin Is Basically A ‘Meme Coin’
data.description:
Brian Armstrong, the CEO of Coinbase, has recently made an audacious statement regarding Bitcoin that has caused quite a stir in the crypto industry. He recently proposed that Bitcoin could be regarded as “somewhat of a meme coin,” which sparked a debate among enthusiasts, analysts, and investors. Related Reading: XRP Bulls Return—Will This Be the Breakout to $3? The Power Of Collective Belief...
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/coinbase-ceos-hot-take-bitcoin-is-basically-a-meme-coin/

data.description:
